title: Check and set up the google-workspace v2 skill:
job:
Check and set up the google-workspace v2 skill:

1. Check if skills/google-workspace v2/ directory exists and what files it contains
2. Check if the skill is already active (symlink in skills/active/)
3. If the skill directory exists but isn't active, create the symlink to activate it
4. Test the skill by running: gws gmail users getProfile --params '{"userId":"me"}'
5. Check if the environment variable GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CREDENTIALS_FILE is set
6. Verify gws CLI is installed: gws --help
7. Report back what works and what needs to be fixed

Use the GOOGlE_WORKSPACE_CLI_CREDENTIALS_FILE GitHub secret that was just added (exposed as environment variable in Docker).
